response.content: Meridian's house view on equities this quarter is a slight overweight overall. US equities are viewed as neutral-to-constructive, with a preference for a quality-factor tilt and a bias toward Healthcare and Industrials for the second half of the year. European equities are modestly overweight on cheaper valuations and because the ECB is ahead of the Fed in the rate cycle. Emerging markets are underweight given the China property overhang and USD strength.
